title: A Day In My Life for Longevity (Live to 120+)

chunks.title: Introduction to Health Span and Longevity
chunks.summary: The host introduces the theme of the video, focusing on daily practices aimed at maximizing both health span and lifespan. They emphasize living healthfully in the present moment and share their intention to demonstrate their daily routine.
chunks.transcript: All >> [applause] [applause] >> right, guys. Welcome to a day in my life for longevity. I'm going to show you guys everything I do in a day to maximize health span and lifespan. I think that health span is lifespan. So, I don't necessarily think about living a long time. I think about how to live really well. I want to live healthfully today. I want to be as energetic and vital as I can today. And I think that equates to longevity. So, let's get started with the day. I'm going to take you through everything I do in a day. It's early in Costa Rica. It's just

chunks.title: Morning Routine and Movement
chunks.summary: The host details their morning routine, which includes getting sunlight and engaging in movements like surfing while highlighting the importance of avoiding prolonged periods of sitting for better health outcomes. They discuss their focused work periods and the need to take breaks to maintain productivity and well-being.

chunks.title: Dinner Preparation and Circadian Rhythm
